name: Macadamia-Chicken Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon Finely chopped (fresh) tarragon or 1 teaspoon dried tarragon soaked in 2 tablespoons white wine
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the chicken and chopped tarragon. If using dried tarragon, soak it for 45 minutes in white wine.
2. Add mayonnaise to sour cream and beat well. Taste for seasoning. Reserve some of the mayonnaise mixture for garnish.
3. Toss the chicken and nuts with the remainder of the dressing.
4. Arrange salad on bed of greens and garnish with reserved mayonnaise mixture, the eggs, and capers.
